name: detect-ready-for-input-numbered-menu-arabic-indic-digit
comment: Historical parity break: an over-eager digit check (e.g. Python str.isdigit()) treats an Arabic-Indic digit as numeric, so it would misclassify this row as a numbered menu option and report not-ready. The correct (ASCII-only) check in both languages does not, so the cursor on this row IS the main input prompt.
